apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.general_idea: Add ServletException to method signature to support HttpServletRequest.logout().
apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.why_exists: HttpServletRequest.logout() throws ServletException, so the method signature must be updated to declare this checked exception, otherwise the code will not compile.
apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.after: public ResponseEntity<?> checkSession(Authentication auth, HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response) throws ServletException

apps/offline-session-client/src/main/jav.general_idea: Migrate HTTP client dependencies from Apache HttpClient 4.x to Apache HttpClient 5.x.
apps/offline-session-client/src/main/jav.why_exists: The old imports (org.apache.http.*) are removed in HttpClient 5; code fails to compile without updating to org.apache.hc.* packages.

apps/offline-session-client/src/main/jav.general_idea: Update HTTP client initialization to use HttpClient 5.x API for SSL context and connection management.
apps/offline-session-client/src/main/jav.why_exists: The old API (SSLConnectionSocketFactory constructor, HttpClients.custom().setSSLSocketFactory) does not exist in HttpClient 5; code fails to compile.

apps/spring-boot-device-flow-client/src/.general_idea: Update requestDeviceCode method signature to remove clientSecret parameter.
apps/spring-boot-device-flow-client/src/.why_exists: Method signature mismatch causing compile error if caller passes 4 args but method expects 3.

apps/spring-boot-device-flow-client/src/.after: private ResponseEntity<DeviceCodeResponse> requestDeviceCode(String clientId, String scope, String deviceAuthUrl)

keycloak/extensions/src/main/java/com/gi.general_idea: Update AccountEmail.send calls to include KeycloakSession as the first argument to match the updated API signature in Keycloak 26.
keycloak/extensions/src/main/java/com/gi.why_exists: Compile error: method 'send' in class 'AccountEmail' cannot be applied to given types; missing required 'KeycloakSession' argument.
